title: Step by step instructions
description:
Step by step instructions

Step by step instructions

	Install either one of the following:

	Visual Studio 2015, 2017, 2019, 2022

	     (Includes Enterprise, Professional, Community,
	 and Express Editions)

	LabVIEW 2009 or later
	Install Epson RC+ 8.0.
	If you are using LabVIEW, install the LabVIEW
	 VI library.
	Ensure that the software key has been enabled
	 for RC+ API in the Controllers you will be using.  Refer to the
	 Epson RC+ 8.0 User's Guide for information on how to enable options
	 in the Controller.

This completes the RC+ API installation.
